name: kimi-plugin-cc
description: Planning bundle and repo skeleton for a Codex-grade Claude Code plugin for Kimi.

scripts.check: bun run build && bunx tsc --noEmit && bun test && git diff --exit-code -- dist
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bunx tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && mkdir -p dist/vendor/shell-quote && cp runtime/vendor/shell-quote/LICENSE dist/vendor/shell-quote/LICENSE
